results.title: De la Fuente sings Lamine’s praises as Spain reaches World Cup quarterfinals
results.description: Against Portugal, Yamal had three attempts on goal, including ​two on target, helping Spain maintain the pressure before Merino’s late winner.

results.title: Hedge funds dumped chip stocks for fourth week as AI shares sold off
results.description: Hedge funds reduced exposure to semiconductor stocks for a fourth consecutive week as AI-related equities came under pressure. According to Reuters, managers continued cutting positions amid profit-taking and concerns over stretched valuations.... Article link
